S.FORM: == qmici == kkui' balay knatan niya wah. qmici' hiya' ga, mutu pshot ramu' na squliq.
S.PHON: == qmiʦ~ʨi == kkuiʔ βalaj knatan nija waħ. qmiʦ~ʨiʔ ħijaʔ ɣa, mutu ps~ɕħot ramuʔ na s~ɕquliq.
S.FORM: == qmici == kkui' balay knatan niya wah. qmici' hiya' ga, mutu pshot ramu' na squliq.
S.PHON: == qmiʦ~ʨi == kkuiʔ βalaj knatan nija waħ. qmiʦ~ʨiʔ ħijaʔ ɣa, mutu ps~ɕħot ramuʔ na s~ɕquliq.
